notes: Backend-down sample was not 7s and not the original automation wall-clock artifact, but responses still often exceeded the 300ms target.
Backend-healthy sample showed repeated 0.5-1.4s toggle response latencies.
Trace segment showed worker/status and product hydrate events overlapping toggle operations.

backendHealthySample.overlap: worker.status.response around 963-1230ms and product hydrate skip/response events were present near toggle pairs

codeFix.summary: useProcessingCoordinator no longer restarts its polling effect when workerStatus state changes; last-known worker status is now kept in a ref.

liveRecheck: blocked until user reloads output/chrome-mv3; Browser Use policy blocks opening chrome://extensions and forbids alternate browser workarounds for the same action
